Uses of Class
neqsim.process.equipment.capacity.CapacityConstraint

Packages that use CapacityConstraint
Package
Description
neqsim.process.design
Process design framework for automated equipment sizing and optimization.
neqsim.process.equipment
 
neqsim.process.equipment.capacity
Equipment capacity constraint framework for process optimization.
neqsim.process.equipment.compressor
 
neqsim.process.equipment.ejector
 
neqsim.process.equipment.heatexchanger
 
neqsim.process.equipment.manifold
 
neqsim.process.equipment.mixer
 
neqsim.process.equipment.pipeline
 
neqsim.process.equipment.powergeneration
 
neqsim.process.equipment.pump
 
neqsim.process.equipment.separator
 
neqsim.process.equipment.splitter
 
neqsim.process.equipment.tank
 
neqsim.process.equipment.valve
 
neqsim.process.util.optimizer
Process optimization engine and constraint evaluation utilities.

    Description

    Method
    Description

    Field
    Description

    ProcessEquipmentBaseClass.capacityConstraints

    Method
    Description

    Field
    Description

    The most limiting constraint on the bottleneck equipment.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    CapacityConstraint
    StandardConstraintType.createConstraint()
    Creates a new CapacityConstraint with this type's predefined settings.
    CapacityConstraint
    CapacityConstrainedEquipment.getBottleneckConstraint()
    Gets the constraint with the highest utilization (the bottleneck).

    Gets the bottleneck constraint (highest utilization).

    CapacityConstraint
    BottleneckResult.getConstraint()
    Gets the limiting constraint.
    CapacityConstraint
    CapacityConstraint.setCurrentValue(double value)
    Sets the current value directly.
    CapacityConstraint
    CapacityConstraint.setDescription(String description)
    Sets a description for this constraint.
    CapacityConstraint
    CapacityConstraint.setDesignValue(double designValue)
    Sets the design/rated value for this constraint.
    CapacityConstraint
    CapacityConstraint.setEnabled(boolean enabled)
    Enables or disables this constraint for capacity analysis.
    CapacityConstraint
    CapacityConstraint.setMaxValue(double maxValue)
    Sets the maximum allowable value (for HARD constraints).
    CapacityConstraint
    CapacityConstraint.setMinValue(double minValue)
    Sets the minimum required value (for constraints like residence time).
    CapacityConstraint
    CapacityConstraint.setSeverity(CapacityConstraint.ConstraintSeverity severity)
    Sets the severity level for this constraint.
    CapacityConstraint
    CapacityConstraint.setUnit(String unit)
    Sets the unit of measurement for this constraint.
    CapacityConstraint
    CapacityConstraint.setValueSupplier(DoubleSupplier supplier)
    Sets the supplier function to get the current value from equipment.
    CapacityConstraint
    CapacityConstraint.setWarningThreshold(double warningThreshold)
    Sets the warning threshold as a fraction of design value.

    Method
    Description
    void
    CapacityConstrainedEquipment.addCapacityConstraint(CapacityConstraint constraint)
    Adds a new capacity constraint to this equipment.
    Method parameters in neqsim.process.equipment.capacity with type arguments of type CapacityConstraint
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private void
    FilterAdsorberCapacityStrategy.addAdsorberConstraints(Map<String,CapacityConstraint> constraints, SimpleAdsorber adsorber)
    Adds constraints specific to adsorber equipment.
    private void
    ElectrolyzerCapacityStrategy.addCO2ElectrolyzerConstraints(Map<String,CapacityConstraint> constraints, CO2Electrolyzer co2Electrolyzer)
    Adds constraints for CO2 electrolyzer.
    private void
    PowerGenerationCapacityStrategy.addCombinedCycleConstraints(Map<String,CapacityConstraint> constraints, CombinedCycleSystem ccs)
    Adds constraints for combined cycle system.
    private void
    ReactorCapacityStrategy.addCSTRConstraints(Map<String,CapacityConstraint> constraints, StirredTankReactor cstr)
    Adds constraints specific to stirred tank reactors.
    private void
    ElectrolyzerCapacityStrategy.addElectrolyzerConstraints(Map<String,CapacityConstraint> constraints, Electrolyzer electrolyzer)
    Adds constraints for water electrolyzer.
    private void
    FilterAdsorberCapacityStrategy.addFilterConstraints(Map<String,CapacityConstraint> constraints, Filter filter)
    Adds constraints specific to filter equipment.
    private void
    PowerGenerationCapacityStrategy.addGasTurbineConstraints(Map<String,CapacityConstraint> constraints, GasTurbine gt)
    Adds constraints for gas turbine.
    private void
    ReactorCapacityStrategy.addGibbsConstraints(Map<String,CapacityConstraint> constraints, GibbsReactor gibbs)
    Adds constraints specific to Gibbs reactors.
    private void
    PowerGenerationCapacityStrategy.addHRSGConstraints(Map<String,CapacityConstraint> constraints, HRSG hrsg)
    Adds constraints for HRSG.
    private void
    ReactorCapacityStrategy.addPlugFlowConstraints(Map<String,CapacityConstraint> constraints, PlugFlowReactor pfr)
    Adds constraints specific to plug flow reactors.
    private void
    PowerGenerationCapacityStrategy.addSteamTurbineConstraints(Map<String,CapacityConstraint> constraints, SteamTurbine st)
    Adds constraints for steam turbine.
    private void
    SubseaEquipmentCapacityStrategy.addTreeConstraints(Map<String,CapacityConstraint> constraints, SubseaTree tree)
    Adds constraints for subsea tree.
    private void
    SubseaEquipmentCapacityStrategy.addWellConstraints(Map<String,CapacityConstraint> constraints, SubseaWell well)
    Adds constraints for subsea well.
    private void
    WellFlowCapacityStrategy.addWellFlowConstraints(Map<String,CapacityConstraint> constraints, WellFlow well)
    Adds constraints for well flow.

    Constructor
    Description
